home.heroTitle: What do you want to do after school? 🤔
home.heroSubtitle: Get a step-by-step plan towards the career you want — colleges, exams, costs and timelines, all in one place!
home.feature1Body: Every milestone in order — which class, which exam, which year.
home.feature2Body: Compare options and filter them by cost: free, low, mid or high.
home.feature3Body: Check specific links to the official sites to confirm.
home.exploreBody: Browse free guides without signing in.
home.disclaimer: Dates, fees and eligibility change every year. Always confirm on official links before acting!

planItYourself.title: Plan It Yourself
planItYourself.intro: No login and no ready-made match for you yet? Use this blank plan and the short guide below to research any career on your own!
planItYourself.templateIntro: Fill each step in for the career you have in mind.
templateSteps: The qualification or degree it needs:
The exam(s) involved and roughly when they happen:
Two colleges or institutes near me:
Approximate cost, and where I confirmed it:
planItYourself.guideTitle: How to research any career on your own
guideSteps: Search the career plus "official" to find the governing body or institute.
Find the real website — prefer .gov.in, .org, or the named institute's own domain.
Look for the "admissions" or "apply" page; that's where real dates and fees live.
Sanity-check fees against a second source — if one number looks too low or too high, dig deeper.
Never pay an "agent" for an application you can submit yourself for free.

footer.rights: A free, public-good tool. Always verify specifics on official sites.
